title: Shift 2 Unleashed

notes:
Retail version was tested.You need to use DXVK with D9VK (both latest versions). Intro and menu works, but no visual. No more black boxes appearing in gameplay (driving). If you would need more help with the black box bug, please consider to go on wine forum, on the following link to apply custom patch to your Wine: https://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=26617
Big thanks for the developer teams behind Wine, D9VK, Proton and of course Steam!
